mapper.select: SELECT BIZ_NO FROM TB_BUSINESS WHERE BIZ_ID = #{bizId}

SELECT p.PRODUCT_ID, p.PRODUCT_CD, p.PRODUCT_NAME, p.BIZ_NO, p.CATEGORY_ID, c.CATEGORY_NAME, TO_NUMBER(p.PRICE) AS PRICE, TO_NUMBER(p.SALE_PRICE) AS SALE_PRICE, NVL(os.STOCK_QTY, 0) AS STOCK_QTY, p.STATUS_CD, p.BRAND_NAME, p.REG_DATE, f.FILE_URL AS THUMBNAIL_URL FROM TB_PRODUCT p JOIN TB_PRODUCT_CATEGORY c ON c.CATEGORY_ID = p.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRODUCT_ID, SUM(STOCK_QTY) AS STOCK_QTY FROM TB_PRODUCT_OPTION GROUP BY PRODUCT_ID ) os ON os.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REF_ID, FILE_URL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY REF_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID) AS RN FROM TB_FILE WHERE REF_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' ) f ON f.REF_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND f.RN = 1 WHERE ORDER BY p.PRODUCT_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PRODUCT p WHERE
SELECT NVL(MAX(PRODUCT_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_PRODUCT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PRODUCT ( PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_CD, PRODUCT_NAME, BIZ_NO, CATEGORY_ID, PRICE, SALE_PRICE, DESCRIPTION, BRAND_NAME, STATUS_CD, TAGS, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{productCd}, #{productName}, #{bizNo}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{salePrice}, #{description}, #{brandName}, #{statusCd}, #{tags}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
INSERT INTO TB_FILE (FILE_ID, REF_TYPE, REF_ID, FILE_URL, ORIGIN_NAME, REG_DATE) VALUES (SEQ_FILE.NEXTVAL, 'PRODUCT', #{productId}, #{fileUrl}, #{originName}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select:
SELECT p.PRODUCT_ID, p.PRODUCT_CD, p.PRODUCT_NAME, p.BIZ_NO, p.CATEGORY_ID, TO_NUMBER(p.PRICE) AS PRICE, TO_NUMBER(p.SALE_PRICE) AS SALE_PRICE, NVL(os.STOCK_QTY, 0) AS STOCK_QTY, p.DESCRIPTION, p.BRAND_NAME, p.STATUS_CD, p.TAGS, f.FILE_URL AS THUMBNAIL_URL FROM TB_PRODUCT p
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRODUCT_ID, SUM(STOCK_QTY) AS STOCK_QTY FROM TB_PRODUCT_OPTION GROUP BY PRODUCT_ID ) os ON os.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REF_ID, FILE_URL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY REF_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID) AS RN FROM TB_FILE WHERE REF_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' ) f ON f.REF_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND f.RN = 1 WHERE p.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND p.BIZ_NO = #{bizNo}
SELECT CATEGORY_ID, PARENT_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, DEPTH FROM TB_PRODUCT_CATEGORY WHERE DEPTH IN ('2','3','4') AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DEPTH, CATEGORY_ID
SELECT OPTION_ID, PRODUCT_ID, OPTION_COLOR, OPTION_SIZE, ADD_PRICE, STOCK_QTY FROM TB_PRODUCT_OPTION WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} ORDER BY OPTION_ID
SELECT NVL(MAX(OPTION_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_PRODUCT_OPTION
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PRODUCT_OPTION (OPTION_ID, PRODUCT_ID, OPTION_COLOR, OPTION_SIZE, ADD_PRICE, STOCK_QTY) VALUES (#{optionId}, #{productId}, #{optionColor}, #{optionSize}, #{addPrice}, #{stockQty})
mapper.select: SELECT ORDER_STATUS AS STATUS, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TB_ORDER WHERE BIZ_NO = #{bizNo} GROUP BY ORDER_STATUS
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ORDER WHERE BIZ_NO = #{bizNo} AND CLAIM_STATUS = 'PENDING'

SELECT o.ORDER_ID, o.ORDER_NO, o.ORDER_STATUS, o.PAY_AMOUNT, o.ORDER_DATE, m.NICKNAME AS BUYER_NAME, m.PHONE AS BUYER_PHONE, m.EMAIL AS BUYER_EMAIL, o.RECV_NAME, o.RECV_PHONE, o.ZIP_CODE, o.ADDR1, o.ADDR2, p.PAY_METHOD, p.TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY, d.COURIER_NAME, d.TRACKING_NO, d.DELIVERY_STATUS, o.CLAIM_STATUS, o.CANCEL_REASON, o.REQUESTED_AT, o.REFUND_AMOUNT, o.MEMBER_NO, o.POINT_USED, o.MEMBER_COUPON_ID FROM TB_ORDER o JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON m.MEMBER_NO = o.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN TB_PAYMENT p ON p.ORDER_ID = o.ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_ORDER_DELIVERY d ON d.ORDER_ID = o.ORDER_ID WHERE o.ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND o.BIZ_NO = #{bizNo}
SELECT ORDER_ITEM_ID, PRODUCT_ID, OPTION_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, OPTION_COLOR, OPTION_SIZE, QTY, UNIT_PRICE, TOTAL_PRICE FROM TB_ORDER_ITEM WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId} ORDER BY ORDER_ITEM_ID
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_ORDER SET CLAIM_STATUS = 'REJECTED' WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND BIZ_NO = #{bizNo} AND CLAIM_STATUS = 'PENDING'
UPDATE TB_PAYMENT SET PAY_STATUS = 'CANCEL' WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
UPDATE TB_PRODUCT_OPTION SET STOCK_QTY = STOCK_QTY + #{qty} WHERE OPTION_ID = #{optionId}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(POINT_BALANCE, 0) FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_MEMBER SET POINT_BALANCE = #{newBalance} WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_POINT (POINT_ID, MEMBER_NO, POINT_TYPE, POINT_AMOUNT, BALANCE_AFTER, REASON_CD, REF_TYPE, REF_ID, REG_DATE) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(POINT_ID),0)+1 FROM TB_POINT), #{memberNo}, 'REFUND', #{pointAmount}, #{balanceAfter}, 'ORDER_CANCEL', 'ORDER', #{orderId}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_MEMBER_COUPON SET STATUS_CD = 'UNUSED' WHERE MEMBER_COUPON_ID = #{memberCouponId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ORDER_DELIVERY WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TB_ORDER_DELIVERY d USING (SELECT #{orderId} AS ORDER_ID FROM DUAL) src ON (d.ORDER_ID = src.ORDER_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET d.${column} = NVL(d.${column}, SYSDATE) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (DELIVERY_ID, ORDER_ID, BIZ_NO, DELIVERY_STATUS, ${column}) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(DELIVERY_ID),0)+1 FROM TB_ORDER_DELIVERY), #{orderId}, #{bizNo}, 'READY', SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ORDER_DELIVERY (DELIVERY_ID, ORDER_ID, BIZ_NO, COURIER_NAME, TRACKING_NO, DELIVERY_STATUS, REGISTERED_AT) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(DELIVERY_ID),0)+1 FROM TB_ORDER_DELIVERY), #{orderId}, #{bizNo}, #{courierName}, #{trackingNo}, #{deliveryStatus}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT ORDER_ID FROM TB_ORDER WHERE ORDER_NO = #{orderNo} AND BIZ_NO = #{bizNo}

SELECT r.REVIEW_ID AS reviewId, r.TARGET_ID AS productId, r.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, r.RATING AS rating, r.CONTENT AS content, r.BIZ_REPLY AS bizReply, r.REG_DATE AS regDate, m.NICKNAME AS nickname, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, oi.OPTION_COLOR AS optionColor, oi.OPTION_SIZE AS optionSize, (SELECT rr.STATUS_CD FROM TB_REVIEW_REPORT rr WHERE rr.REVIEW_ID = r.REVIEW_ID AND rr.REPORTER_TYPE = 'BIZ' ORDER BY rr.REPORT_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS reportStatus, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REVIEW_REPORT rr2 WHERE rr2.REVIEW_ID = r.REVIEW_ID AND rr2.REPORTER_TYPE = 'USER') AS reportCount, (SELECT LISTAGG(m2.NICKNAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY rr2.REG_DATE) FROM TB_REVIEW_REPORT rr2 JOIN TB_MEMBER m2 ON m2.MEMBER_NO = rr2.REPORTER_NO WHERE rr2.REVIEW_ID = r.REVIEW_ID AND rr2.REPORTER_TYPE = 'USER') AS reporterNames, f.FILE_URL AS thumbnailUrl FROM TB_REVIEW r JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON m.MEMBER_NO = r.MEMBER_NO JOIN TB_PRODUCT p ON p.PRODUCT_ID = r.TARGET_ID LEFT JOIN TB_ORDER_ITEM oi ON oi.ORDER_ITEM_ID = r.ORDER_ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REF_ID, FILE_URL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY REF_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID) AS RN FROM TB_FILE WHERE REF_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' ) f ON f.REF_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND f.RN = 1 WHERE r.REVIEW_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' AND p.BIZ_NO = #{bizNo} ORDER BY r.REG_DATE DESC, r.REVIEW_ID DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REVIEW r WHERE r.REVIEW_ID = #{reviewId} AND r.REVIEW_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' AND r.TARGET_ID IN (SELECT PRODUCT_ID FROM TB_PRODUCT WHERE BIZ_NO = #{bizNo})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REVIEW_REPORT WHERE REVIEW_ID = #{reviewId} AND REPORTER_TYPE = 'BIZ' AND STATUS_CD = 'PENDING'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_REVIEW_REPORT (REPORT_ID, REPORTER_TYPE, REPORTER_NO, REVIEW_ID, BIZ_NO, REASON, STATUS_CD, REG_DATE) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(REPORT_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REVIEW_REPORT), 'BIZ', #{bizNo}, #{reviewId}, #{bizNo}, #{reason}, 'PENDING', SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ORDER WHERE BIZ_NO = #{bizNo} AND ORDER_STATUS = 'PAID'
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_PRODUCT_QNA SET ANSWER = #{answer}, ANSWER_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE QNA_ID = #{qnaId} AND PRODUCT_ID IN (SELECT PRODUCT_ID FROM TB_PRODUCT WHERE BIZ_NO = #{bizNo})
